description_long: This is a boxy, military-style camper vehicle with a green and beige camouflage paint scheme. The exterior features a large satellite dish mounted on the roof, a cylindrical rooftop structure, and several utility boxes and vents along the sides. There is a single entry door on the left side, which opens to reveal a simple interior with a chair. The vehicle has four wheels, a rear-mounted spare tire, and various cables and equipment attached to the back. Windows are minimal, with one rectangular window on the right side and several small hatches or vents distributed around the body. The overall design suggests a rugged, utilitarian vehicle intended for mobile operations or field communications.
description: A camouflaged, boxy camper vehicle with a rooftop satellite dish, side entry door, and minimal windows, designed for rugged, utilitarian use.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the open entry door, interior chair, rooftop satellite dish, and cylindrical structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the satellite dish, front utility boxes, cables, and the open side door partially visible.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the single rectangular window, closed hatches, and the full length of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the spare tire, rear access ladder, and the open side door on the left.
attribute_window_configuration: one rectangular window on the right side, several small hatches or vents distributed around the body
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the left side near the front
